content.full_text:
Airport                                                823-0744
Building                                                 823-4240
City Clerk                                               823-4242
City Manager                                             823-4299
Community Development 823-4244
Finance/Personnel                                        823-4247
Fire                                                     823-4265
Police                                                   823-4237
Public Works                                             823-4250
                                        1225 Lincoln Way
                                   Auburn, California 95603
                                    FAX (916) 885-5508


December 5, 1990


Scott Hallabrin
Acting General Counsel
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, CA 95814

Re:  Surplus Campaign Funds

Dear Mr. Hallabrin:

Please be advised that I currently have surplus campaign
funds, approximately $300. It is my intention to transfer
these funds to my future campaign fund. May I do that?

If I can not transfer the funds,

1.  Do I have to spend the surplus funds now?

2.  Is there a time limit to spend the funds?

3.  What can the funds be used for?

Thank you for guidance in this matter.

Sincerely,

[signature]
Annabell McCord
Planning Commissioner
City of Auburn

[The image appears to be a mostly blank or very faint document page. The text content is too light or faded to read with certainty. There may be some text present but it is not legible enough to transcribe accurately.]

Annabell McCord
152 Kenmass Avenue
Auburn, California 95603

Dec 6 1 28 PM 98 2/5/90

Dear Mr. Scott

I mailed a letter to you the
A.D. from the City of Auburn,
regarding Surplus Campaign funds.
I failed to mention the election
date was April 15th (Short bylaw)
and am urged I hear again in
2 years.

I thought you might need
to know when the election date was.
Hoping to hear from you soon,

Sincerely,

Annabell McCord

It is my intention to transfer these funds to my future campaign fund. May I do that? If I can not transfer the funds, 1. Do I have to spend the surplus funds now? 2. Is there a time limit to spend the funds? 3. What can the funds be used for? Thank you for guidance in this matter. Sincerely, Annabell McCord Planning Commissioner City of Auburn The image you provided is completely white, with no visible text, numbers, or any other content. It appears to be a blank page or an extremely overexposed photograph. If you have another image or a different page, please provide it for better results. Annabell McCord 152 Kenmass Avenue Auburn, California 95603 Dear Mr. Scott, I mailed a letter to you this A.M. from the City of Auburn regarding surplus campaign funds. I failed to mention the election date was April 10th. (I lost by 7 votes) and am urged to run again in 2 years. I thought you might need to know when the election date was. Hoping to hear from you soon. Sincerely, Annabell McCord
